description: Address all 7 issues from 2025-05-30-090000 review: gate fail-open, email blast cap/audit, wildcard escaping, feature-key validation, deletedAt filtering, and override DELETE handler with UI reset button.
steps: 1. Fix gate.ts: return { found: false, error: true } on DB error, update callers to return 500 when error is true.
2. Fix email-blast: add 500 recipient cap, add audit log entry after send, filter out soft-deleted users.
3. Fix user-directory: escape SQL LIKE wildcards in search parameter, add isNull(users.deletedAt) filter.
4. Fix feature-control PATCH: validate feature_key against CONTROLLABLE_FEATURES keys.
5. Fix feature-control: add DELETE handler to remove override row.
6. Fix feature-control page.tsx: add reset button to remove override and return to plan-default.
acceptance_criteria: checkFeatureOverride returns error flag on DB failure, callers return 500
Email blast rejects requests with more than 500 recipients
Email blast writes to auditLogs after sending
SQL LIKE wildcards are escaped in user-directory search
PATCH feature-control validates feature_key against CONTROLLABLE_FEATURES
Soft-deleted users are excluded from user-directory and email-blast queries
Feature-control UI has a reset button to remove overrides
npm run build passes without TypeScript errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm zero TypeScript errors
Run `npm test` and confirm existing tests still pass
findings: All 7 review issues fixed. Build passes, all 435 tests pass. Used logSuperAdminAction from lib/audit/super-admin.ts for audit trail since the auditLogs table requires a non-null tenantId. The super_admin_audit_logs table is the correct destination for platform-level actions.
